steps.sql:
SELECT 'main', * FROM main.sqlite_sequence
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'temp', * FROM temp.sqlite_sequence
    ORDER BY 2

VACUUM;
    SELECT 'main', * FROM main.sqlite_sequence
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'temp', * FROM temp.sqlite_sequence
    ORDER BY 2

CREATE TEMP TABLE t3(x);
    INSERT INTO t3 VALUES(1);

VACUUM;
    SELECT * FROM temp.t3 JOIN main.t3;
